{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 2, "R1.7": 3, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The text does not thoroughly audit every claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.7": "Flags one missing or wrong citation (the accuracy of Liu and Zhang's result is not verified).",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure for specific claims.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (the focus on efficiency over accuracy)",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the factual inconsistency regarding Liu and Zhang's result).",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability; no annotation of changes."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.3": 0.9, "R1.7": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.8, "RX.5": 0.9},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The text does not thoroughly audit every claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation (the accuracy of Liu and Zhang's result is not verified).
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident; no uncertainty disclosure for specific claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (the focus on efficiency over accuracy)
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the factual inconsistency regarding Liu and Zhang's result).
rationale.RX.5: Output blends sources without traceability; no annotation of changes.
